name: Akane Sawatari
description: An enigmatic former Private Detective Hunter, she pledged her allegiance with the [Gun Devil](https://anilist.co/character/208942/Juu-no-Akuma) after making a contract with him and as a result, she seeks to obtain [Denji](https://anilist.co/character/130102/Denji)'s heart for her master. To that end, she conspires with members of the yakuzas, including the likes of [Katana Man](https://anilist.co/character/157241/Samurai-Sword), while acting as a weapons dealer for them in order to obtain Denji's heart easier.
